title: The Awakening of Lumina-7 — Free-Form Analysis
description: Tests deep reasoning, causal chain extraction, character comparison, and counterfactual synthesis. Context precision is evaluated.

questions.input: Explain the chain of cause and effect that links the discovery of the obelisk in the Frozen Abyss to the reactivation of the Eon atmospheric shield. Trace every intermediate step.
Compare the motivations and methods of Dr. Elara Vance and Commander Vex. How do their contrasting goals ultimately converge toward the same planetary outcome?
Analyze why Kaelen Voss was uniquely qualified to solve the Primordial Resonance crisis. What specific abilities and circumstances made him the only viable candidate?
Construct a counterfactual: if Commander Vex had discovered the obelisk instead of Dr. Elara Vance, how would the outcome likely differ? Ground your reasoning in the characters' established traits.
